subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Husayn! Upon thee be My Glory! The Wronged One hath turned toward thee from the precincts of the Prison on this Day which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالحسین علیک بهائی ان المظلوم اقبل الیک من شطر السجن فی هذا الیوم الذی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
